title: How outliers affect losses
text: Outliers have large residuals:\n$$r=y-\hat{y}$$\nA loss that grows quickly with |r| gives outliers huge influence during fitting.

title: Compare growth rates
text:
Linear growth in |r| is more robust than quadratic growth:
$$r**{2}$$
Quartic growth is the most sensitive:
$$r**{4}$$

title: Which loss grows fastest?
text: Among |r|, r², and r⁴, which increases the fastest when |r| is large?

title: Pick the robust loss
text: The mean absolute error (L1) corresponds to option B.
